steps.observed: Chart shows Oct 20-24 date range, different price pattern and levels compared to W42. Day tabs updated to Mon Oct 20 through Sat Oct 25. Detection counts different.
W42 shows Oct 13-17 data around 1.16 price range with specific pattern, W43 shows Oct 20-24 with different chart shape and price movements
Chart and all UI elements adapted to smaller viewport. Controls wrapped to fit, chart area reduced proportionally, no horizontal overflow or clipping
Chart expanded to fill the larger viewport, all controls fit on single row, chart area maximized

summary: Tested 13 assertions: all 13 passed. The validation UI loads correctly with dark theme and Perplexity attribution, week picker shows available weeks, chart renders candlesticks with correct colors, detection markers appear as arrows, primitive toggles work independently, TF switching (1m/5m/15m) shows different candle densities, day tabs navigate correctly, session bands render as colored zones, detection count summary updates dynamically, no console errors throughout all interactions, week switching loads different data, and the chart resizes responsively.
